## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between SchoolAI and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO, and website improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/ouoFu2Ko1KesukNMc7fF2eNGYvzsCvsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [First batch of content is live on SchoolAI's site; team discussing visual and UX improvements](https://fathom.video/share/ouoFu2Ko1KesukNMc7fF2eNGYvzsCvsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [Spaces pages (210+) need strategic indexing approach; team to decide on app vs. landing page versions](https://fathom.video/share/ouoFu2Ko1KesukNMc7fF2eNGYvzsCvsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=417.0)
  - [Content workflow is smooth; minor adjustments to title formatting and status updates discussed](https://fathom.video/share/ouoFu2Ko1KesukNMc7fF2eNGYvzsCvsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=983.0)
  - [SEO metrics show positive trends; team to monitor indexing of new content](https://fathom.video/share/ouoFu2Ko1KesukNMc7fF2eNGYvzsCvsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1010.0)

## Topics

### Content Publication and Site Improvements

  - [First batch of content live on SchoolAI's site](https://fathom.video/share/ouoFu2Ko1KesukNMc7fF2eNGYvzsCvsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [Visual suggestions:](https://fathom.video/share/ouoFu2Ko1KesukNMc7fF2eNGYvzsCvsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - [Adjust margins (currently too wide, making text narrow)](https://fathom.video/share/ouoFu2Ko1KesukNMc7fF2eNGYvzsCvsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - [Increase font size for better readability](https://fathom.video/share/ouoFu2Ko1KesukNMc7fF2eNGYvzsCvsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
      - [Improve table of contents visibility and clickability](https://fathom.video/share/ouoFu2Ko1KesukNMc7fF2eNGYvzsCvsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
      - [Enhance CTA visibility and placement](https://fathom.video/share/ouoFu2Ko1KesukNMc7fF2eNGYvzsCvsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Publishing cadence: 3-4 articles/day to catch up on backlog](https://fathom.video/share/ouoFu2Ko1KesukNMc7fF2eNGYvzsCvsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
  - [Meta descriptions being fixed by Jay](https://fathom.video/share/ouoFu2Ko1KesukNMc7fF2eNGYvzsCvsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)

### Spaces Pages Strategy

  - [150,000+ spaces exist; only 210 indexed](https://fathom.video/share/ouoFu2Ko1KesukNMc7fF2eNGYvzsCvsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)
  - [Top-ranking space: Sidekick (app.schoolai.com version)](https://fathom.video/share/ouoFu2Ko1KesukNMc7fF2eNGYvzsCvsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [Decision needed: index app pages vs. www landing pages](https://fathom.video/share/ouoFu2Ko1KesukNMc7fF2eNGYvzsCvsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
  - [Recommendation: Choose one version (leaning towards app subdomain)](https://fathom.video/share/ouoFu2Ko1KesukNMc7fF2eNGYvzsCvsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
  - [For thin content: Enrich pages or use "noindex, follow" robots rule](https://fathom.video/share/ouoFu2Ko1KesukNMc7fF2eNGYvzsCvsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
  - [Nikki to investigate landing page creation process and consult with product team](https://fathom.video/share/ouoFu2Ko1KesukNMc7fF2eNGYvzsCvsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)

### SEO Performance and Metrics

  - [New content not yet indexed; manual push may be needed](https://fathom.video/share/ouoFu2Ko1KesukNMc7fF2eNGYvzsCvsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1010.0)
  - [28-day comparison shows improvements:](https://fathom.video/share/ouoFu2Ko1KesukNMc7fF2eNGYvzsCvsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1053.0)
      - [CTR up to 0.2%](https://fathom.video/share/ouoFu2Ko1KesukNMc7fF2eNGYvzsCvsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1053.0)
      - [Average Google position climbed 5+ points](https://fathom.video/share/ouoFu2Ko1KesukNMc7fF2eNGYvzsCvsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1053.0)
      - [Sam Rush's authority score up 1 point](https://fathom.video/share/ouoFu2Ko1KesukNMc7fF2eNGYvzsCvsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1053.0)
  - [March Google core update complete; expect volatility for a few weeks](https://fathom.video/share/ouoFu2Ko1KesukNMc7fF2eNGYvzsCvsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1066.0)

### Content Workflow and Communication

  - [10 new articles (incl. 2 guides, 8 blogs) coming soon](https://fathom.video/share/ouoFu2Ko1KesukNMc7fF2eNGYvzsCvsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1082.0)
  - [Workflow running smoothly; minor tweaks discussed:](https://fathom.video/share/ouoFu2Ko1KesukNMc7fF2eNGYvzsCvsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1202.0)
      - [Use brackets to differentiate guides from blogs in titles](https://fathom.video/share/ouoFu2Ko1KesukNMc7fF2eNGYvzsCvsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1214.0)
      - [Change article titles to sentence case in Framer](https://fathom.video/share/ouoFu2Ko1KesukNMc7fF2eNGYvzsCvsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1214.0)
      - [Utilize status updates in shared table for better visibility](https://fathom.video/share/ouoFu2Ko1KesukNMc7fF2eNGYvzsCvsQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1202.0)
